description:
Hi team,

Larry Rawlings here (photography vendor). I am unable to sign in to the shared Box folder for the spring gala assets. Could you confirm my vendor account has access? Happy to verify on a quick call.

Thanks,
Larry
short_description: Box vendor folder access not working for photography vendor

description:
Hi team,

Larry here. My Slack SSO via Okta is prompting for an MFA method I did not set up. Could you reset my MFA enrollment on the vendor account?

Thanks,
Larry
short_description: Reset Okta MFA enrollment for vendor Slack SSO
